name: research-foundation
description: Research foundation plugin: philosophy-level process skills (grounding / brainstorming / grilling / executing-plans / handoff / writing-skills) plus a one-page standing principles doc.

interface.shortDescription: Philosophy-level process skills for research work
interface.longDescription: Grounding before opinions, brainstorming before grilling, strict plan execution, session handoff, and skill-authoring discipline — principles, not engineering SOPs.
